---
name: Improvement
about: Suggest a reusable Oracle APEX AI skill improvement
title: "[Improvement]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What Should Improve?

Describe the reusable APEX, SQLcl, PL/SQL, validation, export, or project-profile improvement.

## Why It Is Generic

Explain why this belongs in the shared core and not only in one project's `.oracle-apex-ai/project-profile.md`.

## Proposed Guidance

What should the AI agent do differently?

## Safe Example

Use fictional names and placeholders only.

```text
APP_SCHEMA
WORKSPACE_NAME
https://apex.example.com/ords/
```

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No credentials, tokens, wallets, or connection strings.
- [ ] No private URLs, real schema names, real workspace names, or customer names.
- [ ] No production screenshots or logs with sensitive data.
- [ ] No project-specific rule presented as a generic rule.
